title: Depths and Ores
description:
Depths and Ores adds many new ores, items, armor, weapons, blocks, mobs, bosses and so much more!

This mod was made using Mc Creator
body:
Depths and Ores adds many new ores, items, armor, weapons, blocks, mobs, bosses and so much more

-----------------------------

Ores: (New Ores That Generates in the Over world)

Zinc: Can be used for medicine Potion

Chromium: Can be used for armor and toolset

Nickel: Can be made into a half plate (Half Chestplate)

Sphene / Rutile(Generates in the Nether) / Ilmenite: Can be crafted into Titanium

Titanium: Can be made into armor and toolset

------------------------------

Additions to the End:

End Folk: are Villager type mobs that don't want to trade and will attack once hit. They Drop Endium.

Endium: Along with Titanium, the two can be made into "Endium Infused Titanium Block" and Endium and Titanium

End Towns: Small buildings that scatter The End

--------------------------------------

Paintings:

Added two new paintings by Kristoffer Zetterstrand same painter that made the paintings in the main game.

----------------------------------------

Items:

Endium and Titanium can be used to activate the Endium Infused Titanium Block Portal frame (Built like an Nether Portal) to travel to "The Depths"

------------------------------------

The Depths:

A horrifying end game dimension after The End.

Here you can find new blocks, ore, and mobs

(Need Diamond, Netherite+ Tier Tools and Armor for best experience)

-------------------------------------

Blocks:

Depth Stone and Dark Depth stone can be found here, these can be turned into Depth Stone bricks along with a Dark variant.

Ore:

Depthrite can be found here, this can be used to make armor and a toolset

Mobs:

Depth Stalker: A player sized mob that will attack on sight (Drops Depth Bones)

Depth Crawler: A giant spider like mob that charges at you extremely fast (Drops Depth Eye) 

Depth Seeker: A Enderman / lizard type mob that only attacks you when you attack it (Doesn't drop anything for now)

Boss:

Depth Golem:

This boss can be built similarly like a snow golem

(What materials you need) 

Two Dark Depth Stone Blocks

Depth Skull (Can be crafted with Depth stone, Depth Bones, and a Carved Pumpkin)

The boss summons another mob called:

DepthStone Minion: These guys spawn every now and then when the Depth Golem is hurt. They throw stones at the player.

-------------------------------------------------

This Mod was made in Mc Creator

More Music will come later, For now there is only one, I'm the only one working on the mod for now.

Enjoy and have fun!

More Updates later

If you have any suggestions for the next update for this mod, please leave a comment!

---------------------------------------
The Discord Server is Now Fixed. Now all Channels can be seen
